# Plugin banner — Filament Composer Release Notifier

## Requirements (Filament plugin directory)

- **Aspect ratio**: 16:9  
- **Minimum size**: 2560×1440 pixels  
- **Format**: JPEG (preferred)  
- **File**: [plugin-banner.jpg](plugin-banner.jpg) in this folder  

See the Filament team’s [plugin review guidelines](https://github.com/filamentphp/filamentphp.com/blob/main/PLUGIN_REVIEW_GUIDELINES.md) (image dimensions & duplicate README notes).

## This repo

The committed `plugin-banner.jpg` is a branded banner (title, tagline, `composer require` line) in the same spirit as other Laravel/Filament package banners: light grid, high contrast type, minimal chrome.

To regenerate or tweak:

1. [Beyond Code Banner Generator](https://banners.beyondco.de) — pick a Filament-friendly theme, title **Filament Composer Release Notifier**, subtitle about Packagist/GitHub comparison and **informational / no auto-updates**, export **2560×1440 JPEG**.  
2. Or design in Figma/Canva and export at 2560×1440.

After replacing the file, update any absolute `raw.githubusercontent.com` URLs only if you change branch or repo.
